name: Cheese and Lentil Pudding
recipeInstructions: Pre-heat oven to 190°C/375°F/Gas 5. Cook the lentils in a small saucepan with the water until they form a stiff paste (approximately 10-15 minutes). Remove from the heat and add the cheese, onion, and tomato puree. Season. Mix the egg into the mixture using just enough to bind it together. Grease a one-person casserole dish and press the mixture into it. Bake for 30-35 minutes until golden brown and firm to the touch. Serve with peas and boiled potatoes.
